<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register webhook (coming soon)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/pms/webhooks"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a URL to receive event notifications from KISS (e.g., lock opened, access denied).

**This endpoint is planned for a future release and is not available in V1.**


<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
